name: Ruchi Infrastructure Limited
summary: Ruchi Infrastructure Limited engages in trading of various commodities in India. It operates through Trading, Infrastructure, and Others segments. The company also engages in handling bulk storage of liquid commodities, including edible oils, petroleum products, liquid bulk chemicals, etc.; and operates warehousing facilities for storing agricultural commodities, such as wheat, maize, soybean etc. In addition, it generates power from wind energy; and manufactures and sells soaps, Vanaspati, and lubricants, as well as refines edible oils. The company operates through a network of storage terminals located at 7 ports and 5 railway siding terminals for handling and transporting edible oils, fatty acid, caustic soda lye, phosphoric acid, sulphuric acid, carbon black feed stock, 2- ethyl hexanol, molasses, etc.; and a jetty at Rosy pier in Jamnagar, Gujarat for handling liquid and dry cargo. Further, it is involved in the township, commercial, and residential premises development. The company was formerly known as Ruchi Infrastructure and Finance Ltd and changed its name to Ruchi Infrastructure Limited in June 1995. Ruchi Infrastructure Limited was incorporated in 1984 and is based in Indore, India.
